content: Phase 2: Install @supabase/supabase-js and add env vars
Phase 2: Generate SQL migration file (schema.sql) with 14 tables + RLS policies
Phase 2: Configure Google Fonts and Tailwind design tokens
Phase 2: Build Supabase client + AuthContext (signup/signin/signout/session persistence)
Phase 2: Build ProtectedRoute and PublicRoute components
Phase 2: Build Welcome, Login, Register screens (Spanish UI)
Phase 2: Build TopBar + BottomTabBar + AppLayout components
Phase 2: Build placeholder screens (Home, Despensa, Recetas, Biblioteca, Lista, Descubrir, Settings)
Phase 2: Configure React Router and verify routes work

Phase 2: Apply SQL schema to Supabase (Manual step: user must paste schema.sql in Supabase SQL Editor; programmatic application blocked because service_role key cannot run arbitrary SQL via the project REST API and no DB password / PAT provided)
Phase 3: End-to-end testing with testing_agent_v3 against 10 user stories
Phase 3: Fix issues found in testing
